parties.name: GORDON, JOSEPH 5614 CALIFORNIA STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA

calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Joan Rodman, Esq. for Petitioner Kimberly Cooley.
Ms. Rodman stated that the beneficiary had become an Australian citizen and no claim from the creditor until notice has been received.
The Court stated on the record that the Second Amended Petition filed 11-04-09 was mis-named and actually should be the Third Amended Petition.
Without objection, Order appointing Kimberly Cooley as executor of the decedent's will with full authority singed in open court. No bond.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2009 Continued To Jul-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joan Rodman for Kimberly Cooley.

Ms. Rodman stated that this is a small estate, that they had tried two security companies but they wouldn't do anything unless the Executor had letters, and that there has been an issue with locating family members. In addition, Ms. Rodman stated that she would amend the petition, file it by Friday of this week, and she would address the Examiner's notes. The Court continued the matter to July 22, 2009. Counsel will contact the Examiner.

Judge: David Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
